info.title: WineMarket API
info.description: Backend API for the WineMarket platform.

get.description: Returns the caller's user record. If no local row exists yet, one is lazily created from Clerk profile data on first call.

put.description: Updates the first or last name of the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns the shipping and billing addresses linked to the authenticated user.

post.summary: Set a shipping or billing address
post.description: Creates a new address and links it as the shipping or billing address for the authenticated user. Replaces any previously linked address of the same type.
Submit a pending winemaker role request. One pending request per role per user.
Submit a pending shop-owner role request. One pending request per role per user.

get.description: Admin-only. Returns all role requests with status `pending`.

post.description: Admin-only. Grants the requested capability in Clerk publicMetadata and marks the request as `approved`.
Admin-only. Marks the request as `rejected` without changing Clerk metadata.

get.description: Returns all non-deleted shops with their addresses.

post.description: Creates a new shop for the authenticated shop owner. One shop per user.

get.description: Returns a single shop with address. 404 if not found or deleted.

patch.description: Update name, description, or address of own shop.

get.description: Returns products and bundles for the shop. Filter with `?isBundle=true` or `?isBundle=false`.

get.summary: Get product or bundle by ID

get.description: Returns regular schedule and one-off exceptions for the shop.
Returns all non-deleted wines. Filterable by region, type, color, vintageYear, winemakerId.

post.description: Creates a wine under the authenticated winemaker profile.

get.description: Returns a single wine with winemaker info. 404 if not found or deleted.

put.description: Full replacement of a wine. Must be own wine or admin.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a wine. Must be own wine or admin.

get.description: Returns all non-deleted winemaker profiles with address.

put.description: Updates the authenticated winemaker profile fields.

get.description: Returns a winemaker profile including their wine catalog and events.
Returns all non-deleted wines in the winemaker's catalog.
Returns all non-deleted events hosted by the winemaker.
